leads: A major metropolitan area faced a systemic crisis with no shortage of proposals but no deployment architecture connecting real funding to validated interventions. We built the bridge between policy intent and fiscal execution.
highlights: 9-chapter policy playbook anchored to RCT-validated intervention mathematics
$106M deployment matrix mapping 8 funding sources to 17 endpoints
Three rounds of adversarial stress-testing — every assumption challenged, every number pressure-tested
Three production-grade infographics translating complex fiscal flows into decision-ready visuals
Delivered to elected officials in 10 days.
